playbook.intent: Monthly SaaS audit to kill list + consolidation plan + projected savings.
playbook.scope: Founder audits SaaS + tool sprawl monthly and decides what to cut, consolidate, or replace. Output: kill list, consolidation plan, projected savings. Exit artifact: tool inventory + decisions + cancellation actions taken.

success-criteria.criterion: Complete tool inventory with cost + usage tag
Kill list with cancellation owner + date

stage.name: Inventory
stage.intent: Single source of truth for every active subscription.

tasks.task: Tag each with active user count + last login

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every line item tagged.

stage.name: Decide kill / keep / consolidate

tasks.task: Score each tool by usage x strategic value

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every line item has a decision.

stage.name: Execute + log
stage.intent: Cancel today, plan migrations for the month.
stage.decision-gate: Required: cancellations executed same day. Migrations have owners + dates.

extra.value: [Annual financial close - separate ritual, Migration execution - separate playbook per tool]
[Bookkeeping with tool subscriptions tagged, Last-month vendor + tool inventory]
[Keeping tools 'just in case' - sprawl grows unchecked, Skipping migration plan - kills and rage-buys later, Not logging savings - invisible win = no behavior change]
['Did I cancel today, or schedule a future cancellation?', 'Is the migration plan dated?', 'Did I log the saving in the books?']

{human: faion get-content vendor-tool-consolidation-review --format md, agent: faion get-content vendor-tool-consolidation-review --format context, json: faion get-content vendor-tool-consolidation-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
